thread: RR-Y1-011-D (index-recon event panel 2019-2025), RR-Y1-011-C (KAP PDF PIT-safety)
title: XU030 periodic-reconstitution IN events: abnormal return during ann-to-eff window, first official measurement (N<=3, count=1)
decision_owner: maintainer. Engine MEASURES; never auto-deploys. Even a TRADEABLE verdict is a CANDIDATE only.
discipline_note: Committed BEFORE any result is computed. Engine REFUSES to run unless this file exists with matching hash. ALL thresholds/definitions/keep-bar are FROZEN; post-hoc relaxation = guard-RAISE. No predictor re-definition, no window widening, no benchmark substitution, no cost re-calibration, no keep-bar loosening. MEASUREMENT-ONLY; optimization FORBIDDEN. N=1 test (XU030-IN demand-shock, ann-to-eff window). This is a MEASUREMENT, NOT an optimization.
hypothesis_FROZEN: XU030 stocks added via periodic reconstitution show positive abnormal returns during the announcement-to-effective window due to price-insensitive mechanical demand from passive funds (ETF + index funds) that must buy before the effective date.
mechanism_prior: Institutional-mandatory passive flow (ETF + index fund) must buy XU030-added names by effective date. The ann-to-eff window (observed mean 13.5 days) is the front-running interval for this predictable demand. Prior: below-mid-band. Rationale: index inclusion is one of the most-studied anomalies; 11-19 day public window -> effect likely priced at announcement. Base expectation: NW-t sub-threshold (effect priced). FAIL = valuable negative knowledge (confirms BIST retail window is non-exploitable). PASS requires strong, multi-mode consistent evidence.
honest_expectation: prior LOW-TO-MEDIUM. N=25 small; public announcement 11-19 days before eff; most institutional passive managers have mandates to track closely -> pre-positioning by arbs likely absorbs the demand-shock premium. Likely verdict: FAIL (priced). If PASS: large effect (short window, liquid names, known demand); report plainly.

sample_FROZEN.direction_restriction: IN-only for keep-bar. OUT measured for symmetry check (reported, labeled non-deployable)
sample_FROZEN.survivorship: delisted-included; events with price gaps in window quantified and reported, NOT post-hoc excluded

return_definition_FROZEN.entry: ann_date PIT close (t=0, look-ahead-safe; KAP disclosure timestamp second-precise)
return_definition_FROZEN.primary_metric: CAR (cumulative abnormal return): stock adjusted_close return MINUS EW benchmark return over the window
return_definition_FROZEN.benchmark_LOCK: Equal-weight daily return of bist30=1 members AS OF ann_date (PIT-frozen composition for that event window; stock being added is NOT yet bist30=1 on ann_date -> naturally excluded from benchmark)
return_definition_FROZEN.secondary_horizon: 10-business-day fixed window also reported; NOT primary keep-bar
return_definition_FROZEN.real_deflation: relative return = stock_nominal - benchmark_nominal; TUFE cancels in relative form. Gross nominal CAR also reported for reference.
return_definition_FROZEN.cost_FROZEN: realistic_cost per D-207, Roll+Kyle per-stock (XU030 = large-cap tier). Charged as round-trip on entry (ann_date close) and exit (eff_date close). Cost applied to NET abnormal return (not benchmark leg).

statistical_plan_FROZEN.primary_test: pooled NW-HAC t-statistic on 25 event CARs (events ordered by ann_date; NW lag = ceil(N^(1/3)) = ceil(25^(1/3)) = 3)
statistical_plan_FROZEN.temporal_stability: Mod-B proxy: split events by median ann_date (first 12 vs last 13); both halves must show positive mean CAR. Sign-flip in either half = FRAGILE.
statistical_plan_FROZEN.mod_a_secondary: name-split reported but N-small warning (22 unique symbols, 25 events; keep-bar does NOT depend on Mod-A given N<30)
statistical_plan_FROZEN.dsr: DSR deflation applied with denenen_konfig_sayisi=1 (single frozen design; E[max_N] correction minimal but honest)
statistical_plan_FROZEN.forbidden: sub-group slicing, composite-weight optimization, alternative window mining, post-hoc benchmark substitution, cost re-calibration to achieve keep-bar

keep_bar_FROZEN_all_required.i: Primary NW-t >= 2.0, event-specific gap window, nominal relative (stock - EW-XU030), cost-adjusted
keep_bar_FROZEN_all_required.ii: Sign consistent: both temporal halves show positive mean CAR (no sign-flip)
keep_bar_FROZEN_all_required.iii: Effect meaningfully exceeds cost threshold (breakeven analysis: required raw CAR to net positive)
keep_bar_FROZEN_all_required.verdict_rule: ALL THREE PASS -> TRADEABLE (demand-shock front-running window exploitable; CANDIDATE only). ANY fail -> NOT-TRADEABLE (recorded clean).
keep_bar_FROZEN_all_required.out_direction: OUT measured for mechanism-symmetry check; reported 'measured, not deployable' (long-only constraint); OUT keep-bar is NOT included

event_panel.description: 1003 rows x 12 cols; XU030-IN N=25; built RR-Y1-011-D

adjusted_prices.description: daily adj_close + bist30 flag 2019-01-02..2026-05-26; all 22 XU030-IN symbols covered
adjusted_prices.known_gaps: FROTO ann_date=2018-12-21 is before data start 2019-01-02; use 2019-01-02 as entry (first trading day after holiday period, which IS the eff_date -> 0-day gap; event excluded from window analysis, recorded as gap_event)

tufe.note: used for gross real return calc; cancels in relative CAR

data_sources_FROZEN.guard: engine asserts these hashes on load; mismatch RAISES

strangler_constraints.zero_touch: committed motors (src/signals/, src/screening/, src/engine/) NOT modified; this is a standalone research script
strangler_constraints.ci_impact: zero (standalone research script; no src/ changes)

outputs: docs/yol1/RESULTS_INDEX_RECON_XU030_IN.json (after run: 25 event CARs + NW-t + temporal halves + cost analysis + verdict)
